title: Restrepiopsis grandiflora
taxonomy: Restrepiopsis grandiflora is classified as an epiphytic orchid. More specifically, it belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Restrepiopsis. The genus Restrepiopsis is part of the tribe Maxillarieae. The species is native to Central and South America, adding to its unique characteristics. Restrepiopsis grandiflora is a rare and fascinating species within its classification.
